name: Figure
description: Image with caption as real <figure>/<figcaption> semantics. The same figure.* tokens style markdown figures produced by the rehype-figure plugin, so authored and markdown content share one contract.

useCases: Markdown case studies use the ![image] + *caption* pattern — rehype-figure converts it to the same markup

antiPatterns.scenario: Caption as a styled paragraph next to a plain
antiPatterns.reason: Loses the programmatic image-caption association screen readers rely on.
antiPatterns.alternative: Figure with the caption prop, or the markdown pattern.

antiPatterns.scenario: Meaningful image with empty alt inside a Figure
antiPatterns.reason: The caption does not replace alt text — they serve different audiences.
antiPatterns.alternative: Alt text for content, caption for commentary.

a11y: Caption is supplementary — images keep their own alt text
